productDisplayName: Vital Gear Unisex Black Messenger Bag
description: VITALGear is the one stop shop for those who prefer reliable and quality bags. Carry your laptop in style with this Yogear bag from VITALGear. With ample space for office accessories as well as your laptop, the bag is best suited for office and general heavy duty use. Height: 30 cm Width: 35 cm Depth: 10 cm Made of 600 D polyester One adjustable shoulder strap with padded body material pad. A flap covering the main compartment with branding and graphic print on top has click lock closure Main compartment with a nylon zipper with a slider for closure Main compartment has a padded separator for a laptop with elastic band and Velcro fastener for closure. A zippered compartment on the front with organiser pouches, mobile pocket and a big nylon zipper mesh compartment with a slider for closure Care Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring
